name: Frozen Lady Heath Dessert
recipeInstructions:
1. Line the bottom and sides of an 8-inch springform pan with ladyfingers, cutting them to fit.
2. Dissolve the coffee in boiling water.
3. Cool the mixture.
4. Crush 4 Heath Bars carefully, being careful not to smash them.
5. Combine the crushed candy bars with the dissolved coffee and softened ice cream.
6. Spoon the mixture into the prepared pan and freeze until firm.
7. Whip the cream and cream de cacao until stiff.
8. Spread the whipped topping over the frozen ice cream mixture.
9. Crush the remaining Heath Bar and sprinkle it over the whipped cream layer.
10. Cover with foil and freeze until firm.
11. Cut into wedges to serve.
